## What does this improve?

Explain the Windows user experience, privacy, compatibility, or maintenance reason for this change.

## Validation

- [ ] I used synthetic data only.
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes.
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` passes.
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes.
- [ ] `git ls-files work outputs` prints nothing.
- [ ] I updated the beginner walkthrough if a command or required step changed.

## Privacy

- [ ] This pull request contains no messages, databases, personal paths, datasets, tokenizers,
      checkpoints, generated private replies, or trained weights.
